name: zhihu-answer-article-exporter
description: Export Jiang Yaogeng's Zhihu answers/articles into portable Markdown, rendered HTML, homepage-style previews, and GitHub Pages-ready docs.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/export-zhihu-sample.mjs && node --check scripts/build-zhihu-preview-pages.mjs && node --check scripts/build-zhihu-article-repo.mjs && node --check scripts/publish-github.mjs
